projectDescription: A Terraform module that creates and manages AWS RDS database instances, subnet groups, parameter groups, option groups, and related monitoring resources.
keyFeatures: Creates and manages AWS RDS DB instances with support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, MSSQL, and MariaDB
Manages DB subnet groups, parameter groups, and option groups as composable submodules
Supports read replicas and cross-region replication
Enhanced Monitoring via CloudWatch with automatic IAM role creation
Blue/Green deployment support for low-downtime upgrades
Secrets Manager integration for master user password management and rotation
Performance Insights and CloudWatch log group integration
Storage encryption with KMS key support and autoscaling
publicApiSurface: variable: identifier (required) - The name of the RDS instance
variable: engine - Database engine (mysql, postgres, oracle-*, sqlserver-*, mariadb)
variable: engine_version - Engine version string
variable: instance_class - RDS instance type (e.g. db.t3a.large)
variable: allocated_storage - Storage size in GB
variable: db_name - Initial database name
variable: username - Master DB username
variable: manage_master_user_password - Delegate password management to Secrets Manager
variable: vpc_security_group_ids - Security groups to associate
variable: subnet_ids - VPC subnet IDs for subnet group
variable: create_db_subnet_group - Toggle subnet group creation
variable: create_db_parameter_group - Toggle parameter group creation
variable: create_db_option_group - Toggle option group creation
variable: create_monitoring_role - Auto-create enhanced monitoring IAM role
variable: multi_az - Enable Multi-AZ deployment
variable: replicate_source_db - Source DB identifier for read replica
variable: blue_green_update - Enable Blue/Green deployment
variable: parameters - List of DB parameter objects to apply
variable: options - List of DB option objects to apply
variable: performance_insights_enabled - Enable Performance Insights
variable: deletion_protection - Prevent accidental deletion
output: db_instance_endpoint - Connection endpoint
output: db_instance_address - Instance address
output: db_instance_arn - Instance ARN
output: db_instance_master_user_secret_arn - Secrets Manager ARN for master password
output: db_subnet_group_id - Subnet group name/ID
output: db_parameter_group_id - Parameter group ID
output: db_option_group_id - Option group ID
output: enhanced_monitoring_iam_role_arn - Monitoring IAM role ARN
